title: Smoky Shrimp Enchiladas
description: A twist on traditional enchiladas, this dish combines the flavors of smoky chipotle peppers and delicate shrimp for a spicy and savory meal.

ingredients.name: smoky chipotle peppers in adobo sauce

instructions: Cook shrimp according to package instructions until pink and fully cooked.
In a separate pan, heat the chipotle peppers in adobo sauce over medium heat.
Add a splash of water to the pan to create a sauce and stir to combine.
Dip each tortilla into the sauce to coat, then place on a flat surface.
Arrange a few cooked shrimp in the center of each tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of cheese.
Roll up the tortillas and place seam-side down in a baking dish.
Pour the enchilada sauce over the rolled tortillas and top with additional cheese.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, sour cream, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
